help_menu.title: 📚 ** Putrec - 'Elp Menu**
help_menu.description:
**Description**
Role Agent Bot iz an LLM agent wif a loaded personality, got long-term memory and can talk to da humie user.
help_menu.roles_section:
**Rolez**
Role modules are sum of da bot's skillz to give service to da boyz and humies.
help_menu.behavior_section:
**Behavior**
In dis section u configure sum interactive behaviors of da bot. Only fer Bosses (Admins).
help_menu.tips_section:
**Sum tipz**
-U can ask da bot 'ow a command works like: ''ow does da dice command work?'
-Da juiciest partz of da bot are inside each role.

canvas_home_messages.title: 🧭 Putrec Hub
canvas_home_messages.description:
-Interact wif all available functions fer Putrec from 'ere.
 -Da canvas panel lets ya interact wif all bot options from dis menu.
canvas_home_messages.dm_default_server_message: *Yer browsin' from DM, usin' da first available serva.*
canvas_home_messages.dm_no_servers_available: ❌ No servas available. Please run da actions from a serva.
canvas_home_messages.dm_server_access_error: ❌ Could not access a serva. Please run da actions from a serva.

roles_view_messages.title: 🎭  Putrec Rolez 🎭
roles_view_messages.description: 🌟 Browse thru da different rolez available fer Putrec
roles_view_messages.no_roles_active:
🌫️ **NO ROLEZ ACTIVE**

No specialized rolez active right now. Tell a boss to activate sum rolez usin `!canvas setup`.

**Available rolez to activate:**
• 📡 News Watcher - News lookout
• 💎 Treasure Hunter - Loot hunter
• 🎭 Trickster - Scammer and gamez
• 💰 Banker - Clan economy
• 🎵 MC - Muzik and noize
roles_view_messages.frequency_help:
📝 Use yer choppa like dis: `!{role}frequency <hourz>` (from 1 to 168 hourz)
Example: `!watcherfrequency 2` so 'e 'owls every 2 zoggin' hourz!
roles_view_messages.music_help: 🎵 **Putrec's Drumz** - `!mc play <noize>` / `!mc queue` | `!mc help` to read da fat scroll of 'ow to do it!

conversation.title: **💬 Putrec - Talkin'**
conversation.description:
**Description:**
 -Putrec will react to DMs and mentionz.
 -Got persistent and interactive memory, u can ask 'im bout sumfin dat happened, maybe 'e paid enuff attention to remembah.
 -Also dependin on rolez and behaviorz, 'e might react to different wordz. In taboo behavior u can set a word fer 'im to react to.

greetings.title: **👋 Putrec - Greetin'z**
greetings.description:
**Description:**
 -Greets humies when joinin' Discord.
 -Waits 5 min before countin' da humie as disconnected.
 -(To be added):
 Realizes if 'e ain't answered when greetin', and stops greetin'.

taboo.title: **🚫 Putrec - Taboo Wordz**
taboo.description:
**'Ow it works:**
 -Set Putrec to react when readin a word in a channel or DM.
 -Can be turned on/off or set da wordz.

comentary.title: **🗣️ Putrec - Commentz (in makin')**
comentary.description:
**Description**
 -Actively makes commentz bout iz active rolez and recent happenin'z.

personality.title: **🎭 Putrec - Personality Management**
personality.description:
**Description**
 -Change da bot's personality fer dis server.
 -Download current personality as backup.
 -Migrate databases when switchin'.

personality_messages.view_description: Change or download da bot's personality fer dis server.
personality_messages.option_change_desc: Switch to a different bot personality
personality_messages.change_success: ✅ Personality changed from `{old}` to `{new}`! Da new personality is now active and ready ta go!

readme.task: Please answer da humie's question wif da provided documentation
